title: stelis megalops
intro: Stelis megalops, also known as the Giant Stelis or Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis megalops include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant. Stelis megalops can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
